action.reasoning: Observation: 10 iterations of segfault (exit 139) without any training completion; even SimpleMLP crashes. Data checks found no invalid edges. Analysis: Persistent segfault suggests memory exhaustion from loading full 350k graphs or GPU compatibility issue with DataLoader. Since test_env succeeded with 128 graphs, the likely culprit is peak RAM when loading full data. Decision: Create train_minimal.py that loads only 2000 graphs from file but deletes full data before training. Set device='cpu' to eliminate GPU crashes. Train SimpleMLP 2 epochs. If successful, submit eval for first baseline score and measure iteration time. If still crashes, narrow down further.
